enforcement.comment: full = command + LLM prompt hooks. lite = command only (no token cost)

stop_hook.comment: true = LLM reviews conversation for implicit decisions on Stop (costs tokens). false = command-only check.

decision_detection.comment: true = PostToolUse scans for decision patterns. false = rely on discover-decisions.sh

commit_dd_reference.comment: warn = show DD list. block = reject commit without Ref: DD-NNN

notifications.comment: channel: slack/discord/webhook/desktop/none. min_level: critical/daily/all/none. URL via env: DRE_NOTIFY_URL
